query:
-- Check what other SasBoss services cost $49 to understand if it's a standard product price
SELECT planName, serviceType, COUNT(*) as count, 
  MIN(monthlyRevenue) as minRev, MAX(monthlyRevenue) as maxRev,
  GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT supplierName) as suppliers
FROM services
WHERE monthlyCost = 49.00
GROUP BY planName, serviceType
ORDER BY count DESC;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user dgdAH8nVC5Tv7xw.94a9498ba7da --database SkibUwiSvPndpvTSJv52KC --execute 
-- Check what other SasBoss services cost $49 to understand if it's a standard product price
SELECT planName, serviceType, COUNT(*) as count, 
  MIN(monthlyRevenue) as minRev, MAX(monthlyRevenue) as maxRev,
  GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT supplierName) as suppliers
FROM services
WHERE monthlyCost = 49.00
GROUP BY planName, serviceType
ORDER BY count DESC;
